CONTENT.Club career: Mehlem joined Darmstadt 98 from his boyhood club Karlsruher SC in 2017. He would stay with there for seven years, being a part of the side that got The Lilies into the Bundesliga for only the second time in their history.Following top flight relegation three months earlier, Mehlem signed a two-year deal with EFL Championship club Hull City on 1 August 2024 for an undisclosed fee.
CONTENT.International career: Mehlem is a former Germany youth international, representing his country between U16 and U19 levels.

SUMMARY: Marvin Mehlem (born 11 September 1997) is a German professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for EFL Championship club Hull City.
